expectations.text: No more than 5 consecutive words match the original
expectations.evidence: Maximum 3 consecutive words match (e.g., 'deep learning', 'computer vision')

expectations.text: Uses passive voice conversion where appropriate
expectations.evidence: Maintains passive 'have been extensively applied' and adds formal passive constructions
Uses 'which represent a fundamental architecture in this field' as parenthetical clause

expectations.text: Preserves technical terms (CNN, deep learning, computer vision)
expectations.evidence: All technical terms preserved: CNN, deep learning, computer vision, convolutional neural networks
